chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 61 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. Applicant present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 20-10-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- This application has been filed by the applicant/complainant in person seeking transfer of Sessions Case No.511 of 2016, arising out of Crime No.33 of 2016, registered at P.S, Gambat under Sections 324, 337H(ii), 504, 147, 149 PPC on the ground that in the year 2017, he had filed an application for constituting a super medical board challenging the opinion of the medical board, but that application has not been decided by the trial Court. 2. Mr. Habib-ur-Rahman Shaikh, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 and has opposed this application stating that the trial Court has no jurisdiction to decide his application and even otherwise, there is no provision of super medical board and after the opinion of medical board, only an application for view of the final opinion can be filed. 3. Learned Additional P.G has further informed that the case is pending since 2016 and the complainant is not appearing to proceed with the matter. 4. In view of above, no case for transfer of the subject sessions case has been made out. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed and the applicant is directed to proceed with the matter before the trial Court without fail. JUDGE 2 Ahmad
